title: Adapt Type within User-Scalable Bounds
summary: Build and verify css responsive type in shift deck type at narrow wide and zoomed sizes through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.

content.text: Responsive typography combines relative minimum and maximum sizes with a fluid preferred expression. Clamp can mix rem and viewport components so text responds without becoming viewport-only. Container and content constraints still matter. Browser zoom, root font preferences, long content, and extreme viewport sizes must all retain readable hierarchy and wrapping. Apply it to shift deck type at narrow wide and zoomed sizes.
